author: istefox
description: Local-first library of AI prompts with categorization, search, and quick reuse. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Stefano Ferri
manifest.description: Local-first library of AI prompts with categorization, search, and quick reuse.
manifest.name: Promptbox

name: Promptbox

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/istefox/promptbox/compare/1.5.1...1.5.2
